name: Shouji Endou
description:
Shouji is Komatsu Nana's boyfriend. Friends at first, they build up their relationship and Shouji moves to Tokyo applying for art school with Nana joining him a year later. Their relationship is pure and kind but later on they can't seem to keep it going as they both are too busy with their lives.

~!Shouji says he will lie in the same grave as Nana but that soon changes when he falls in love with a waitress at his work, Sachiko.!~
